item.text:
What should I speed up?

1. Is the target the app runtime, tests, build, CI, a script, or something else?
2. What feels slow: startup time, page load, command execution, API latency, database queries, or overall workflow?
3. How should we verify improvement: a specific command, benchmark, test run, or observed behavior?

--- Learning check ---

Pick one concrete “slow thing” and one way to measure it. That turns “speed things up” into an actionable performance task.
